title: lecanorchis hokurikuensis f. kiiensis
intro: Lecanorchis hokurikuensis f. kiiensis, also known as the Japanese orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lecanorchis hokurikuensis f. kiiensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
